mapper.select: select a.user_id, a.room_id, a.order_date, a.product_id, b.name, a.order_quantity, a.order_price from (select user_id, room_id, order_date, product_id, sum(order_quantity) as order_quantity, sum(order_price) as order_price from hhn.`order` where 1=1 and room_id = #{roomId} and order_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} and status = '1' group by user_id, room_id, order_date, product_id) as a left outer join hhn.product b on (a.product_id = b.product_id) order by a.order_date, a.product_id

SELECT user_id, room_id, checkin_date, checkout_date, role FROM hhn.user WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND role = 'GUEST' AND checkin_date <= #{endDate} AND checkout_date >= #{startDate} ORDER BY checkin_date ASC

select a.product_id, b.name, a.user_id, a.room_id, a.order_date, a.order_quantity from (select product_id, user_id, room_id, order_date, sum(order_quantity) as order_quantity from hhn.`order` where 1=1 and room_id = #{roomId} and order_date = #{orderDate} and status = '0' group by product_id, user_id, room_id, order_date) as a left outer join hhn.product b on (a.product_id = b.product_id) order by a.product_id
select product_id, name, price, 0 as order_quantity from hhn.product order by product_id
mapper.insert:
insert into hhn.`order` (user_id, room_id, order_date, product_id, order_quantity, order_price, status, create_date, update_date)
select a.user_id, a.room_id, now(), #{order.productId}, #{order.orderQuantity}, (b.price * #{order.orderQuantity}), 0, now(), now() from hhn.user a left outer join hhn.product b on (b.product_id = #{order.productId}) where 1=1 and a.checkin_date <= now() and a.checkout_date > now() and a.room_id = #{order.roomId}
